servinfosub.title: Function Check
servinfosub.ptxt: When ignition is ON with brake pedal depressed, select lever button (1) can be pushed and select lever can be shifted from P range.
Check that when ignition is OFF or ACC, the select lever button cannot be pressed regardless of the status of the brake light switch, and the lever cannot be moved to any gear other than P.

s1.ptxt: Disconnect select lever connector (1) and set ignition ACC.
Check that shift lock solenoid rod moves smoothly and returns when positive terminal of battery is connected to terminal “5” and negative terminal of battery is connected to terminal “10”.
If solenoid rod does not move smoothly, replace select lever assembly.
